description: The Libri are a powerful 'ndrina (mafia clan) based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, allied with the De Stefano, Condello, and Tegano clans. They control illegal activities in central Reggio Calabria, particularly Cannavò, and are present in several neighborhoods. The clan has been involved in the Second 'Ndrangheta war and has faced multiple arrests and asset seizures. As of the latest information, they remain active.
